name: medkit
title: Small Medkit
description: A compact medkit. Restores 25 health and 5 sanity.

name: ration
title: Emergency Ration
description: A sealed packet of food and water. Restores a small amount of health.

name: crew-photo
title: Crew Photo
description: A worn photograph of smiling crew members. It brings a moment of calm.

name: crew-photo
title: Crew Photo
description: Distorted photo of your crew. They do not look human to you. Something is wrong here...

name: id-card
title: ID Card
description: An ID card with a photo and name. It might be useful for identification.

name: eva-suit
title: EVA Suit
description: A spacesuit for extravehicular activity. Provides protection in the vacuum of space.

name: lucky-charm
title: Lucky Charm
description: A small charm carried by a former crew member. It radiates faint comfort.

name: crew-dogtag
title: Crew Dogtag
description: A metal dogtag engraved with a name. A reminder of humanity.

name: toolbox
title: Toolbox
description: A small toolbox with basic tools.

name: battery
title: Battery Pack
description: A spare battery pack. Useful for powering small devices.

name: crate
title: Small Crate
description: A small sealed crate. Might contain supplies.

name: pulsing-residue
title: Pulsing Residue
description: A faint pulsing residue. Prolonged exposure causes nausea and damage.
linger_message: You feel nauseous from the residue.

name: strange-signal
title: Strange Signal
description: An anomalous electromagnetic signal. Prolonged exposure causes headaches.
linger_message: A piercing headache builds as the signal pulses.

name: spore-cloud
title: Spore Cloud
description: A drifting cloud of spores. Linger exposure damages health and sanity.
linger_message: The spores bite at your lungs and mind.

name: echoing-void
title: Echoing Void
description: A distortion in space-time. You hear whispers that aren't there.

name: crew-log
title: Crew Log
description: A personal log terminal. Use 'inspect' to read.

name: log-medical
title: Log - Medical
description: A medical log terminal. Use 'inspect' to read.

name: debris
title: Scattered Debris
description: Bits of broken equipment and loose panels.

name: captain_override
title: Captain Override Key
description: Encrypted command key used by the captain to authorize emergency evacuation. Required to unlock the escape pod’s command interface.

name: engineering_stabilizer
title: Engineering Stabilizer Module
description: Portable stabilizer designed to counteract local temporal drift. Without it, the escape pod’s launch sequence cannot synchronize with real-time.

name: biometric_seal
title: Biometric Seal
description: A medical-grade biometric authenticator containing encoded crew signatures. Required to satisfy the escape pod’s identity verification protocol.
